curatedFacts.founded: 1905, named after Peter Robinson, who led Irish settlers here in 1825
curatedFacts.landmarks: Peterborough Lift Lock (world's highest hydraulic lift lock), Canadian Canoe Museum, Riverview Park & Zoo, Trent-Severn Waterway
curatedFacts.notable: known as 'The Electric City' (first municipality in Canada to use electric streetlights in 1884) — charming gateway to the Kawarthas lake country
curatedFacts.economy: education (Trent University, Fleming College), manufacturing (General Electric), tourism, healthcare, agriculture
curatedFacts.entityDesc: Peterborough is a city in Central Ontario, Ontario, Canada, with a population of approximately 83,651. Education (trent university, fleming college), manufacturing (general electric), tourism, healthcare, agriculture.
curatedFacts.longDesc:
Peterborough isn't just Ontario's city — it's a place where ambition meets opportunity. Founded named after Peter Robinson, who led Irish settlers here in 1825, this city has transformed into a thriving community of ~83,000 people.

What makes Peterborough remarkable for {BUSINESS_TYPE}? Character and community. The city encompasses everything from Little Lake, Hunter Street Bridge, Peterborough Musicfest, Kawartha Craft Beer Festival, Riverview Park. Each neighborhood has its own character, its own needs, and its own expectations.

The local economy is driven by education (Trent University, Fleming College), manufacturing (General Electric), tourism, healthcare, agriculture. This economic foundation creates steady demand for services and supports a community that takes pride in maintaining its properties and infrastructure.

Community features include Peterborough Lift Lock (world's highest hydraulic lift lock), Canadian Canoe Museum, Riverview Park & Zoo, Trent-Severn Waterway, which give Peterborough its distinctive character.

Peterborough benefits from its location in Central Ontario. Whether you need routine {SERVICE} maintenance or a major project, {COMPANY_NAME} understands what Peterborough properties need. We've invested the time to learn this community — the local building codes, the weather patterns, the neighbourhood expectations. That's why Peterborough residents keep choosing {COMPANY_NAME}.

Our promise: transparent pricing, professional execution, results that last. Call {PHONE} for your {ESTIMATE_TYPE} estimate today.
